title: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium heat.
Generously butter one side of each slice of bread.
Place one slice of bread, butter-side down, into the hot skillet.
Place the slices of cheese on top of the bread.
Place the second slice of bread on top, butter-side up.
Cook until the bottom bread is golden brown, then flip the sandwich.
Continue cooking until the second side is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
substitutions: Use margarine or mayonnaise instead of butter for the exterior.
Substitute sourdough or whole wheat bread for white bread.
Use American or Swiss cheese instead of cheddar.
